news.title: CM Shri Bhupendra Patel launches the state wide free HPV vaccination mega campaign from Sola Civil Hospital, Ahmedabad - CMO Gujarat
news.summary: CM Shri Bhupendra Patel launches the state wide free HPV vaccination mega campaign from Sola Civil Hospital, Ahmedabad  CMO GujaratHealth dept tightens HPV rollout on U-WIN; finger marking, consent must  The Times of IndiaKarnataka launches HPV vaccination drive to prevent cervical cancer  The HinduWe are committed to welfare and growth: CM Chandrababu Naidu  The New Indian ExpressHPV vaccine for girls launched in district  Tribune India
